name: Kathmandu
description: The capital city and cultural heart of Nepal, featuring ancient temples, bustling streets, and vibrant heritage.

destinations.name: Swayambhunath Stupa (Monkey Temple)
destinations.description: An ancient religious architecture atop a hill in the Kathmandu Valley.

destinations.name: Pashupatinath Temple
destinations.description: One of the most sacred Hindu temples of Nepal located on the banks of the Bagmati River.

stories.title: A Walk Through Ason
stories.author: Priya Gurung
stories.excerpt: Ason is a vibrant open market where you can find everything from spices to traditional brass utensils. The energy here is infectious.

name: Kaski (Pokhara)
description: The gateway to the Annapurna Circuit, renowned for its serene lakes and spectacular mountain views.

destinations.name: Phewa Lake
destinations.description: A beautiful freshwater lake reflecting the majestic Machhapuchhre peak.

destinations.name: Sarangkot Viewpoint
destinations.description: Famous for spectacular sunrise and sunset views over the Annapurna range.

stories.title: Boating under the Machhapuchhre
stories.author: James Anderson
stories.excerpt: There's nothing quite like rowing a colorful boat on Phewa Lake while looking at the fishtail mountain.

name: Solukhumbu
description: Home to Mount Everest, deep valleys, and the legendary Sherpa culture.

destinations.name: Everest Base Camp
destinations.description: The iconic destination for trekkers worldwide, standing at the foot of the highest mountain.

destinations.name: Namche Bazaar
destinations.description: The vibrant trading hub and final frontier town before higher Everest altitudes.

stories.title: Reaching EBC
stories.author: Sarah Jenkins
stories.excerpt: After 8 grueling days, seeing the Khumbu icefall and reaching Base Camp brought tears to my eyes.

name: Chitwan
description: A wildlife haven offering dense jungles, exotic safaris, and a rich biodiversity.

destinations.name: Chitwan National Park
destinations.description: A UNESCO World Heritage site known for its one-horned rhinos and Bengal tigers.

stories.title: A Close Encounter with a Rhino
stories.author: Rohit Thapa
stories.excerpt: During our jungle walk, we spotted a massive one-horned rhino just a few meters away. Terrifying yet magnificent!

name: Mustang
description: A mystical desert landscape lying behind the Himalayas, offering unique Tibetan culture and dramatic canyons.

destinations.name: Muktinath Temple
destinations.description: A highly venerated sacred place for both Hindus and Buddhists.

destinations.name: Lo Manthang
destinations.description: The walled capital of the former Kingdom of Lo.

stories.title: Riding through the endless desert
stories.author: Bikash Shrestha
stories.excerpt: Motorbiking to Muktinath was the most thrilling ride of my life. The winds, the dust, and the towering mountains are unforgettable.
